title: Global markets fall on tech fears and rate hike expectations
summary: The S&P 500 suffers its longest losing streak in 10 months and the Nasdaq falls 5% weekly, dragging Asian and European stock markets.

title: SpaceX moves toward Nasdaq 100 and expands its rocket and communications businesses
summary: Elon Musk's company prepares to enter the index, while closing debt agreements and mobile partnerships for Starlink.

title: Experts offer investment and savings strategies for the long term
summary: Articles from various media advise on diversified portfolios, passive income, and how to avoid ruining retirement during vacations.

title: Earthquake in Venezuela leaves more than 900 dead and 3,000 injured
summary: The 7.3 magnitude earthquake causes devastation and rescue teams search for survivors among the rubble.

title: Middle East tensions and oversupply cause oil to fall
summary: Crude oil hits four-month lows due to disputes between the United States and Iran and fears of global overproduction.

title: Meta explores prediction markets as CFTC investigates Polymarket
summary: Zuckerberg seeks to integrate Polymarket and Kalshi, while the US derivatives regulator examines the betting platform.

title: US government restricts access to advanced artificial intelligence models
summary: OpenAI limits its latest ChatGPT to trusted partners and Anthropic receives permission to offer its 'Mythos' model to US companies.

title: Bitcoin crashes and Binance leaves the European Union
summary: The cryptocurrency falls 27% in five days to its lowest level since 2024, while exchange Binance withdraws from the European market due to lack of license.

title: Tariffs and trade restrictions escalate between the United States, China, and the European Union
summary: Trump threatens a 100% tariff on digital services, the EU imposes taxes on aluminum scrap, and China limits beef imports.

title: Merger and acquisition movements in Europe and the United States
summary: Bumble explores its sale, UniCredit courts Commerzbank shareholders, and Unilever negotiates the purchase of supplement maker Thorne.

title: Europe suffers historic heatwave and typhoon threatens Japan
summary: Germany records 41.3 degrees Celsius while a double typhoon approaches Japan with possible transportation disruptions.

title: Fed could raise interest rates at end of year, according to Kashkari
summary: The Minneapolis Fed president anticipates a rate hike that shakes tech markets.

title: Wendy's shares surge on speculative rally
summary: The fast-food chain suddenly rises in stock market, although analysts warn that euphoria may hide fundamental issues.

title: Micron earnings drive volatility in South Korean markets
summary: Micron's profits trigger circuit breakers in South Korea and generate optimism among semiconductor investors.

title: Banking regulators tighten rules in the United States, United Kingdom, and Europe
summary: The ECB simplifies rules for large banks, the UK strengthens investment trust regulations, and critics warn against deregulation.

title: OpenAI delays its initial public offering until 2027
summary: The delay of OpenAI's IPO causes declines in S&P 500 and Nasdaq futures.

title: Apple raises product prices and pressures Asian stock markets
summary: Apple's price increases generate concerns about tech demand and affect the Nikkei and Topix indices.

title: ECB anticipates lower inflation and Euribor falls
summary: The ECB survey shows lower inflation expectations, while the daily Euribor records a significant drop.

title: Harmony Gold plummets and United States sanctions a gold refinery in Rwanda
summary: Harmony Gold shares fall 12% and the United States imposes sanctions on the Rwandan gold industry.

title: China Eastern buys Airbus planes and Rheinmetall loses frigate contract
summary: The Chinese airline acquires 25 Airbus A330neo worth $9.4 billion, while the German manufacturer suffers a drop due to the cancellation of a military order.
